description_long: This is a cubic wooden crate with a light brown finish, featuring visible wood grain lines and reinforced edges. Two of its faces are marked with bold, hand-painted red and black 'TNT' lettering, suggesting it is intended to represent an explosive storage box, often seen in video games or themed environments. The other two faces are plain, with only the wood grain and corner fasteners visible, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The box appears to be solidly constructed, with recessed panels framed by thicker wooden borders and small metallic fasteners at the corners. The top surface is flat and bordered, suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, and the lid appears to be a simple, removable flat top.
description: A cubic wooden crate with light brown wood grain, reinforced edges, and bold 'TNT' markings on two sides. The box has a rugged, utilitarian look with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'TNT' label in red and black on a recessed wood panel, with visible wood grain and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view is plain, showing only the wood grain, recessed panel, and metallic fasteners at the corners, with no labeling.
description_view_2: Opposite face to the front, also features the 'TNT' label in red and black, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: Opposite side to view 1, plain with wood grain and corner fasteners, no labeling or signage.
